how.title: How Fawran Works
how.step1_desc: Enter pickup address, drop-off location, and parcel details
how.step2_desc: A nearby courier accepts your order instantly
how.step3_desc: Track your delivery in real-time until it arrives

features.title: Why Fawran?
features.f1_desc: See your courier's location in real time
features.f2_desc: Dispatch dozens of orders to a single courier
features.f3_desc: Pay with points and earn more with every order
features.f4_desc: Rate your experience and help us improve
features.f5_desc: Get live updates on every order status change
features.f6_desc: Our team is ready to help you anytime

about.title: Who We Are
about.body: Fawran is a local delivery platform born in Suez to serve individuals and businesses. We believe fast, reliable delivery is a right for everyone.
about.mission_body: To make delivery fast, reliable, and fairly priced for everyone in Egypt.
about.vision_body: To be Egypt's number one delivery partner from north to south.

download.title: Ready to Start?
download.subtitle: Download the app now and get started in seconds
